ip_outcome_note: Card name directly names the depicted character. Confirmed via Bandai official card listing and Galactic Battle roster at dbs-cardgame.com. Frontmatter updated: ip_verified: true.

trivia_bullets.text: BT1-064 is from Galactic Battle (DBS-B01), the inaugural main booster of the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, released July 28, 2017. Green cards in the set were built around destruction and reactive board control; Raging Attacker Vegeta was singled out on the official Bandai strategy page as the green-color Counter:Attack showcase.
sources: dbs-cardgame.com: Galactic Battle Red and Green Cards strategy page
tcdb.com: 2017 Dragon Ball Super BT1 Galactic Battle set entry

trivia_bullets.text: Green Battle card, Rare, power 15,000. Counter:Attack skill allows the card to be played from hand during the opponent's attack step to KO an opposing Battle Card — reactive disruption encoding Vegeta's canonical strike-back aggressor mode.

The card's dark Saiyan battle armor and upswept golden energy aura place it in the Z-era Super Saiyan visual register rather than the DBS god-tier (Super Saiyan Blue) continuation. The BT1 green-color Vegeta cards anchor on Vegeta's warrior-prince identity from the Saiyan Saga, with the god-tier prints (BT1-036 God Charge Vegeta, Blue, Rare) assigned to a separate color.

The 'Saiyan' trait shared by BT1-064 with Goku, Bardock, Trunks, and Gohan prints across BT1-BT4 is the foundational green-color subarchetype Bandai built from the first set. BT1-064's Counter:Attack role makes it a functional reactive piece within that Saiyan-trait aggression axis.
sources: dbs-cardgame.com BT1 card list (Saiyan trait filter)
